name: fantrove-verse
description: Fantrove Emoji & Symbols Hub — static build system

scripts.dev: echo 'Development mode: open index.html / home/index.html directly in browser (no build required)'
scripts.postbuild: npm run generate-sitemap && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const src='sitemap.xml'; const dest='dist/sitemap.xml'; try{ fs.mkdirSync('dist',{ recursive:true }); fs.copyFileSync(src, dest); console.log('sitemap copied to', dest); } catch(e) { console.warn('sitemap copy failed:', e && e.message ? e.message : e); }"
